baselines.name: nvcomp_cascaded
baselines.notes: Use nvidia.nvcomp.Codec(algorithm='Cascaded') on raw BF16 bytes when available.

baselines.name: nvcomp_bitcomp
baselines.notes: Use nvidia.nvcomp.Codec(algorithm='Bitcomp') when the installed nvCOMP wheel exposes it.

baselines.name: zipserv_tca_tbe
baselines.notes: GPU-resident pybind path keeps wrapper allocation overhead but excludes CPU/GPU transfer.

baselines.name: tca_tbe
baselines.notes: ZipServ's TCA-TBE is the triple-bitmap encoding in the local ZipServ_BF16 source tree.

baselines.name: falcon
baselines.notes: Provide --falcon-root when source is available; adapter records exact command and result JSON.
